data.title_en: Invocation (upon receipt of the loan) for someone who lends you money

items.chapter_title_en: Invocation (upon receipt of the loan) for someone who lends you money
items.arabic_text: ((بارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فِي أَهْلِكَ وَمَالِكَ، إِنَّمَا جَزَاءُ السَّلَفِ الْحَمْدُ وَالأَدَاءُ)).
items.english_text: (May Allah bless for you, your family and wealth. Surely commendation and payment are the reward for a loan.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Barakal-lahu laka fee ahlika wamalik, innama jaza-os-salafil-hamdu wal-ada'.)
